description_long: This sconce features a cylindrical main body with a flat, circular face and a prominent, angled cover or shade that appears to be partially detached or open. The top of the fixture has a rectangular mounting plate with a central protrusion, likely for securing the sconce to a wall. The design is sleek and modern, with smooth, unadorned surfaces and a uniform dark finish. The angled cover likely serves to direct light downward or outward, providing focused illumination. The fixture appears to be constructed primarily from metal or a high-quality plastic, giving it a robust and durable appearance. There are no visible decorative motifs, emphasizing a minimalist and functional aesthetic.
description: A modern, cylindrical wall sconce with a smooth, dark finish and an angled cover for directional lighting. The design is minimalist and functional, with a prominent mounting plate.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cylindrical body, flat face, and the angled cover extending outward, with the mounting plate visible at the top.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlights the thickness of the cover and the central mounting protrusion, with the cover's slant more pronounced.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the cylindrical body and the mounting plate, with the cover partially obscuring the lower section.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, showing the mounting plate and the cover's attachment, with the cylindrical body mostly visible.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a minimalist, modern design with clean lines and a smooth, unembellished surface. Its angled cover and cylindrical form emphasize functionality and contemporary style.
